Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, I still have Aragaki's[n]leave of absence extension form...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I already gave her Aragaki's leave[n]of absence extension form...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have Aragaki's leave of[n]absence extension form.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I try talking to Aragaki again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was asked to deliver the school[n]reinstatement form to Aragaki.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}He's usually in the back alley near the[n]station. Should I go look for him there?[n]{f 1 1}
